definition: A single-select choice rendered as a row of adjacent, always-visible buttons (the iOS/macOS segmented control or 'pill' toggle group). The Selection Intent's single model in a horizontal, live-immediacy variant — exactly one option pressed, choosing commits immediately. Distinct from a multi-select toggle-button group and from Tabs (which disclose panels rather than set a value).
usage: Delivered by the Segmented Control block, composing Selection, Focus Delegation (roving, horizontal), and the Typography / Density intents.
